# I Miss You Memorial

> A place to create a beautiful online memorial page for someone you love — their photos, their story, and the voices of everyone who misses them. A complete tribute page is free, forever. Every tribute stays online; we never charge a family to keep a memory alive.

I Miss You Memorial (imissyoumemorial.com) helps families build and keep memorial tribute pages: photo and note boards, a life story told in chapters, voice and video memories, candles and flowers left by visitors, and family moderation so every word waits for the family before it appears. Pricing is $0 for a complete page · Plus at $97 once or $12/month for video, voice, and every photo · Concierge, a hand-built tribute, from $499.

## Pages

- [Home](https://imissyoumemorial.com/): what a tribute page is, pricing, and answers to common questions
- [See an example tribute](https://imissyoumemorial.com/sites/eleanor): Eleanor's page, a complete living example
- [Begin a memorial](https://imissyoumemorial.com/onboarding): a gentle, one-question-at-a-time way to start
- [Contact](https://imissyoumemorial.com/contact): a person answers

## Notes on remembering

- [What to write on a memorial page, when there are no words](https://imissyoumemorial.com/blog/what-to-write-on-a-memorial-page): gentle, honest phrases for a mother, a father, a partner, a friend
- [When Facebook memorializes an account: what happens next](https://imissyoumemorial.com/blog/facebook-memorialized-account-what-happens): what legacy contacts can and cannot do, and how families keep what matters
- [A guide to QR code memorials: plaques, benches, and headstones](https://imissyoumemorial.com/blog/qr-code-memorial-guide): how the codes work and how to choose a page that outlasts the plaque

## Promises

- Every tribute stays online. Free stays free, forever.
- If a Plus plan lapses, the page stays; premium features rest. Nothing is ever deleted.
- Families choose who sees a page — public, unlisted, or password-protected — and whether search engines may find it.
